publicationstmt.publisher: Medical Historical Library, Cushing/Whitney Medical Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Medical Historical Library, Cushing/Whitney Medical Library

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday May 1, 2024 at 02:00

did.unittitle: Pamphlets on public health

corpname.part: Medical Historical Library, Cushing/Whitney Medical Library

did.abstract: The collection includes pamphlets and other materials regarding public health created by national, state, and municipal government agencies and other organizations from 1879-1966. Collection materials address topics including child care, comunicable diseases, health care, hygiene, midwifery, nutrition, and sanitation and public health administration, laws, and statistics. Most materials address public health concerns in the United States except Series VI. Public health, foreign countries, which includes material created by international organizations and organizations in other countries.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The collection is open for research.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Provenance for collection materials is unknown. Collection was created by Medical Historical Library staff.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The collection is organized in seven series: Series I. American Public Health Association, 1883-1945. Series II. National organizations, non-governmental, 1922-1957. Series III. United States Public Health Service, 1918-1966, undated. Series IV. Other United States government agencies, 1919-1962. Series V. United States, state or territory, 1879-1962, undated. Series VI. Public health, foreign countries, 1924-1965. Series VII. Children's health, 1921-1965.

Series V. United States, state or territory, is further organized into sub-series for each state or territory. Series VI. Public health, foreign countries, is further organized into 2 sub-series: International organizations and Single country.
Items in each series and sub-series are organized alphabetically by author name and date.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Pamphlets on public health. Historical Library, Harvey Cushing / John Hay Whitney Medical Library, Yale University.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection includes pamphlets and other materials regarding public health created by national, state, and municipal government agencies and other organizations from 1879-1966. Collection materials address topics including child care, comunicable diseases, health care, hygiene, midwifery, nutrition, and sanitation and public health administration, laws, and statistics. Most materials address public health concerns in the United States except Series VI. Public health, foreign countries, which includes material created by international organizations and organizations in other countries.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright status for collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

did.unittitle: American Public Health Association
American Public Health Association, Abstract of report on disinfection and disinfectants by a committee appointed by the American Public Health Association. New Haven, Connecticut, circa 1883.
American Public Health Association, American Public Health Association: Brooklyn meeting, October 22-25. New York City, New York, 1889.
American Public Health Association, Health Exhibition. Brooklyn, New York, September 2, 1889.
American Public Health Association, Constitution and by-Laws reported at the meeting of the American Public Health Association held at Mexico City in 1906. Mexico City, Mexico, 1906.
American Public Health Association, Constitution and by-Laws of the American Public Health Association . 1909.
American Public Health Association, Revised list of members: American Public Health Association . 1909.
American Public Health Association, Proceedings of the Conference of State and Provincial Boards of Health of North America 1918 . Concord, New Hampshire: Rumford Press, 1918.
American Public Health Association, The A.P.H.A . memberometer . Boston, Massachusetts, 1919.
American Public Health Association, The A.P.H.A.: whom is it for? what does it do? . Boston, Massachusetts, 1920.
American Public Health Association, A half century of public health . New York City, New York, 1921.
American Public Health Association, Books for sanitarians . New York City, New York, circa 1922.
American Public Health Association, Preliminary program of the American Public Health Association: fifty-sixth annual meeting . Cincinnati, Ohio, 1927.
American Public Health Association, A brief description of the American Public Health Association . New York City, New York, 1930.
American Public Health Association, American Public Health Association 63rd annual meeting . Pasadena, California, 1934.

American Public Health Association, The health conservation contests sponsored by the Chamber of Commerce of the United States and the American Public Health Association . New York City, New York, 1934.
American Public Health Association, American Public Health Association sixty-fifth annual meeting . New Orleans, Louisiana, 1936.
American Public Health Association, Bibliography on public Health and allied subjects . New York City, New York, 1938.
American Public Health Association, A manual of tuberculosis case-finding . New York City, New York, 1940.
American Public Health Association and the United States Public Health Service, Employment opportunities in public health . New York City, New York, 1945.
American Public Health Association, The American Public Health Association: whom is it for? what does it do? Boston, Massachusetts, n.d.
American Public Health Association, Let there be light: valuable books to be given to readers . n.d.
American Public Health Association, Memorandum of the American Public Health Association of legislation affecting the public health . Richmond, Virginia, n.d.
American Public Health Association, The merit system service . New York City, New York, n.d.
American Public Health Association, Summary of the constitution herewith proposed for the American Public Health Association . n.d.
National organizations, non-governmental
Gas Appliance Manufacturers Association, Inc., Our health...our strength . New York City, New York, 1951.
Granville, William Anthony, Health conservation and sanitation . Chicago, Illinois: The Insurance Economics Society of America, 1922.

The Institute of Life Insurance, the National Association of Life Underwriters, Public Service Award Program: the contribution of the life insurance business to the health and welfare of the American people... 1957.

National Health Council, Signs of the health times . New York City, New York, 1955.
The National Sanitation Foundation, President's Report for 1949 . Ann Arbor, Michigan, 1950.
Snyder, William F., The need for unformity in sanitation . Delavan, Wisconsin: The National Sanitation Foundation, 1950.
United States Public Health Service

Community Health Station, After the "flu"- what? . Framingham, Massachusetts, n.d.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes hygiene class certificate and hygiene class pupil record card.

did.unittitle: Mississippi State Board of Health, Manual for midwives , Special Bulletin no. 21. Jackson, Mississippi, 1928.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes lapel pin on booklet, midwife permit, midwife record card, monthly report for midwife card, document about midwife activities in Mississippi, document about midwife clubs, and midwife club report.

Ministere de la Sante Publique et de la Population, Recueil des textes officiels intéressant la santé publique et la population . Paris, France, 1962.
General Headquarters Supreme Commander for the Allied Powers, Public Health and Welfare Sections, Mission and accomplishments of the occupation in the public health and welfare fields . Japan, 1949.
Rodrigues, D.H., Guest-chamber for the soul: public health in the Netherlands . New York City, New York: The Netherlands Information Bureau, 1949.
The Health Division, Department of Films and Publications Government of Pakistan, Five years of revolutionary government . Karachi, Pakistan: Saifee Printers, 1965.
Caro, Bienvenido, Genara S. M. de Guzman, Elinor D. Stanford, Genevieve R. Soller, Report of nursing visit Baguio Health Department Training Center . Phillipines, circa 1953.
Statens Instit för Folkhälsan, Berättelse över verksamheten via Statens Instit för Folkhälsan . Stockholm, Sweden, circa 1954.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: In Swedish with appendix in English.

did.unittitle: Medical Department, Tanganyika Formulary . Uganda: Government Printer, 1952.
N.A. Semashko Institute of Public Health Adminstration and the History of Medicine, Ministry of Health of the USSR, The health services in the Soviet Union . Moscow, USSR, 1958.
Children's health
American Medical Association, Bureau of Health Education, Medical society school health committees: their functions and activities . Highland Park, Illinois, 1953.
Emerson, William R. P., Mabel Skilton, Institute on the nutritional problems of children . Buffalo, New York: Buffalo Department of Health, 1927.
Health educators at work , High School Journal, Vol. 30, No.3 May, 1947. Chapel Hill, North Carolina, 1947.
Metropolitan Life Insurance Company, Hospitalization and surgical care of ...children . New York City, New York, 1965.
Michigan State Department of Social Welfare, Agency and institutional care of children in Michigan: 1961 annual statistical report . Lansing, Michigan, 1962.
Minnesota Department of Health, Child health services in Minnesota: report of the American Academy of Pediatrics study of child health services in Minnesota . Minnesota, 1951.
Mississippi School Health Service, Mississippi State Board of Health, Mississippi Department of Education, A Suggested School Health Program . Jackson, Mississippi, 1947.
Oregon State Board of Health, Child health services in Oregon: report of the American Academy of Pediatrics study of child health services in Oregon . Oregon, 1948.
Palmer, Joseph C., Tenth annual report of the health supervision of public school children. Syracuse, New York: Department of Public Instruction, 1923.
San Francisco Tuberculosis Association, San Francisco's plan for handling the health problem of its school children. San Francisco, California, 1921.
